queries.name: Implementation Onboarding Table
queries.description: Deals in Project Handover, ONE ROW PER DEAL, for companies whose client stage is Sales Handover, Customer Onboarding, or Customer Success (covers the full onboarded + post-onboarding population; no handover-date restriction). Product classification is by PARENT product: product_family is 'HR and Payroll' and/or 'Perform Pro' (Perform Pro = PeopleBox + Sprout Perform Pro); product_name lists the consolidated product groups on the deal (HR and Payroll, HR, Payroll, Payroll Outsourcing, Payroll Starter, HR and Payroll Outsourcing, Performance+, Sprout Perform, Insight, Sprout Gov, Sprout Bundle, Implementation Fee, PeopleBox, Sprout Perform Pro), pipe-joined. Rider products (Salary Disbursement, Statutory Payment, Final Pay, Annualization) are included in product_name + MRR only when the deal also has an identified product. Columns: company_id/name, company_deal_count (drillthrough when >2 deals), deal id/name/stage/pipeline, client stage/status, active_for_implementation (new business = client stage Sales Handover/Customer Onboarding; upsell = Implem_upsell_onboarding='Yes'), product_family, product_name, bundled_products, deal MRR (sum of line items), implem fee amount + waive/paid status; company implementation fields: segment, implem packages, project manager, co-project manager, company owner, payroll master, salesperson, HR & Payroll software implementers, software implementation officer, CSM, headcount + starting headcount, proposal/NPN/welcome-email/target-KOM/actual-KOM/handover/on-hold/churn dates, Sprout HR URL, payroll code, industry, address. For the Implementation team's app.
queries.sql:
WITH li_tag AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(li.deal_id AS BIGINT) AS deal_key,
    li.product_name AS pn,
    -- Consolidated product group (product_name column), classified by PARENT product.
    CASE
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%peoplebox%'                                              THEN 'PeopleBox'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%perform pro%'                                            THEN 'Sprout Perform Pro'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%hr and payrol%' AND lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%outsourc%' THEN 'HR and Payroll Outsourcing'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%hr and payrol%'                                          THEN 'HR and Payroll'
      WHEN li.parent_product IN ('HR','HR Lite','HR Only')                                          THEN 'HR'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%payroll outsourc%'                                       THEN 'Payroll Outsourcing'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%payroll starter%'                                        THEN 'Payroll Starter'
      WHEN li.parent_product IN ('Payroll','Just Payroll')                                          THEN 'Payroll'
      WHEN li.parent_product = 'Performance+'                                                        THEN 'Performance+'
      WHEN li.parent_product = 'Sprout Perform'                                                      THEN 'Sprout Perform'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%insight%'                                                THEN 'Insight'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%gov%'                                                    THEN 'Sprout Gov'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%sprout bundle%'                                          THEN 'Sprout Bundle'
      WHEN lower(li.parent_product) LIKE '%implementation fee%'                                     THEN 'Implementation Fee'
    END AS grp,
    -- Special-case rider products: included only when the deal also has an identified product.
    CASE WHEN lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%salary disbursement%'
           OR lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%statutory payment%'
           OR lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%final pay%'
           OR lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%annualization%'
         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_rider,
    CASE WHEN li.recurring_billing_frequency IS NOT NULL
          AND lower(trim(li.recurring_billing_frequency)) <> 'one time payment'
          AND li.contract_term_months >= 12
          AND NOT (li.product_name = 'Instacash' OR li.product_name LIKE '%Ready%')
         THEN li.mrr ELSE 0 END AS li_mrr,
    CASE WHEN lower(li.product_name) LIKE '%implement%' THEN li.amount ELSE 0 END AS li_implem,
    CASE WHEN li.bundled_products IS NOT NULL AND li.bundled_products NOT IN ('None','')
         THEN li.bundled_products END AS bundled_clean
  FROM shared.revops.silver_line_items li
),
-- keep classified products + rider products only
li_kept0 AS (
  SELECT * FROM li_tag WHERE grp IS NOT NULL OR is_rider = 1
),
-- does the deal have at least one IDENTIFIED (classified) product?
flags AS (
  SELECT deal_key, MAX(CASE WHEN grp IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_id
  FROM li_kept0 GROUP BY deal_key
),
li_kept AS (
  SELECT k.deal_key,
    CASE WHEN k.grp IS NOT NULL THEN k.grp ELSE k.pn END AS name_val,   -- rider carries its own product name
    CASE WHEN k.grp IN ('PeopleBox','Sprout Perform Pro') THEN 'Perform Pro'
         WHEN k.grp IS NOT NULL                           THEN 'HR and Payroll' END AS fam_val,  -- NULL for riders → excluded from family
    k.li_mrr, k.li_implem, k.bundled_clean
  FROM li_kept0 k
  JOIN flags f ON f.deal_key = k.deal_key
  WHERE k.grp IS NOT NULL OR (k.is_rider = 1 AND f.has_id = 1)   -- riders only ride along
),
-- one row per deal
deal AS (
  SELECT deal_key,
    array_join(sort_array(collect_set(fam_val)),  ' | ') AS product_family,   -- 'HR and Payroll' / 'Perform Pro' / both
    array_join(sort_array(collect_set(name_val)), ' | ') AS product_name,     -- consolidated groups + riders
    SUM(li_mrr)                                          AS deal_mrr,
    SUM(li_implem)                                       AS deal_implem,
    array_join(collect_set(bundled_clean), ' | ')        AS bundled_products
  FROM li_kept GROUP BY deal_key
),
-- distinct qualifying deals per company (same filters as the main query) → drives drillthrough
qual AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT deal.deal_key, d.company_id AS cid
  FROM deal
  JOIN shared.revops.silver_deals   d ON CAST(d.deal_id AS BIGINT) = deal.deal_key
  LEFT JOIN shared.revops.silver_company c ON CAST(d.company_id AS BIGINT) = CAST(c.Company_id AS BIGINT)
  WHERE d.stage_label = 'Project Handover'
    AND c.Client_stage IN ('Sales Handover', 'Customer Onboarding', 'Customer Success')
),
dc AS (
  SELECT cid, COUNT(DISTINCT deal_key) AS company_deal_count FROM qual GROUP BY cid
)
SELECT
  c.Company_id AS company_id, c.Company_name AS company_name, dc.company_deal_count AS company_deal_count,
  d.deal_id, d.deal_name, d.stage_label AS deal_stage, d.pipeline_name AS deal_pipeline,
  c.Client_stage AS client_stage, c.Client_status AS client_status,
  -- Active for implementation: new business = client stage Sales Handover/Customer Onboarding;
  -- upsell (PH Upsell Pipeline) = Implem_upsell_onboarding flag = 'Yes'.
  CASE WHEN d.pipeline_name = 'PH Upsell Pipeline'
         THEN CASE WHEN c.Implem_upsell_onboarding = 'Yes' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END
       WHEN c.Client_stage IN ('Sales Handover', 'Customer Onboarding') THEN 'Yes'
       ELSE 'No' END AS active_for_implementation,
  deal.product_family, deal.product_name, deal.bundled_products,
  deal.deal_mrr AS mrr, deal.deal_implem AS implem_fee_amount,
  CASE WHEN NULLIF(TRIM(c.Implementation_fee_status),'') IS NOT NULL THEN c.Implementation_fee_status
       WHEN deal.deal_implem = 0 THEN 'Waived'
       WHEN deal.deal_implem > 0 THEN 'Paid' ELSE NULL END AS implem_fee_waive_or_paid,
  c.Segment AS segment, c.Implem_packages AS implem_packages, c.Project_manager AS project_manager,
  c.Co_project_manager AS co_project_manager, c.Company_owner AS company_owner,
  c.Payroll_master AS payroll_master, c.Sales_Consultant AS salesperson,
  c.HR_software_implementer AS hr_software_implementer,
  c.Payroll_software_implementer AS payroll_software_implementer,
  c.Software_implementation_officer AS software_implementation_officer,
  c.Customer_Success_Manager AS customer_success_manager,
  c.Headcount AS headcount,
  c.starting_headcount AS starting_headcount,
  date_format(c.Proposal_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')          AS proposal_date,
  date_format(c.NPN_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')               AS npn_date,
  c.NPN_month AS npn_month,
  date_format(c.Welcome_email_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')     AS welcome_email_date,
  date_format(c.Target_KOM, 'dd-MM-yyyy')             AS target_kom,
  date_format(c.Actual_KOM, 'dd-MM-yyyy')             AS actual_kom,
  c.KOM_month AS kom_month, c.KOM_quarter AS kom_quarter, c.KOM_year AS kom_year,
  date_format(c.Project_handover_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')  AS project_handover,
  c.Sprout_hr_url AS sprout_hr_url,
  c.Payroll_company_code AS sprout_payroll_code,
  date_format(c.Churn_effectivity_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy') AS churn_date,
  date_format(c.on_hold_start_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')     AS on_hold_start_date,
  date_format(c.on_hold_end_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy')       AS on_hold_end_date,
  c.Industry AS industry, c.Company_address AS company_address
FROM deal
JOIN shared.revops.silver_deals   d ON CAST(d.deal_id AS BIGINT) = deal.deal_key
LEFT JOIN shared.revops.silver_company c ON CAST(d.company_id AS BIGINT) = CAST(c.Company_id AS BIGINT)
LEFT JOIN dc ON dc.cid = d.company_id
WHERE d.stage_label = 'Project Handover'
  AND c.Client_stage IN ('Sales Handover', 'Customer Onboarding', 'Customer Success')
ORDER BY c.Company_name, d.deal_id
